title: Martin Marietta Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings Conference Call
text: RALEIGH, N.C., Jan. 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) will host its fourth-quarter and full-year 2021 earnings conference call on Thursday, February 10, 2022 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company will release results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2021, that morning before the market opens.

title: MLM or VMC: Which Concrete & Aggregates Stock Should You Buy?
text: Upbeat housing demand and federal infrastructure spending are likely to benefit the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry. Let's see whether MLM or VMC is a better buy at the moment.
